mapper.select: select cm.tenant_id as tenantId, cm.menu_id as menuId, m.menu_name as menuName, ifnull(cm.status,'0') as status from hc_customer_menu cm inner join sys_menu m on m.menu_id = cm.menu_id and m.menu_type in ('M','C','F') where cm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
select menu_id from hc_customer_menu where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select menu_id from hc_customer_menu where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and status = '1'
select count(1) from hc_customer_menu where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.update: update hc_customer_menu set status = #{status} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: insert into hc_customer_menu (tenant_id, menu_id, status, is_enabled, create_by, create_time) values (#{tenantId}, #{menuId}, ifnull(#{status},'0'), ifnull(#{isEnabled},'1'), #{createBy}, now())

insert into hc_customer_menu (tenant_id, menu_id, status, is_enabled, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.menuId}, ifnull(#{item.status},'0'), ifnull(#{item.isEnabled},'1'), #{item.createBy}, now())
